description: Geographic hierarchy for states and districts
Production metrics for major cereal crops
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CEREALS_MAJOR (
	CEREAL_MAJOR_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	YEAR_ID BIGINT,
	RICE_AREA_1000HA DOUBLE PRECISION,
	RICE_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	RICE_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DOUBLE PRECISION,
	WHEAT_AREA_1000HA DOUBLE PRECISION,
	WHEAT_PRODUCTION_1000TONS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	WHEAT_YIELD_KG_PER_HA DOUBLE PRECISION
);
